use tokio::sync::mpsc;

async fn event_loop(mut rx: mpsc::Receiver<Event>, mut timeout: tokio::time::Interval) {
    let mut current_request: Option<String> = None;
    loop {
        tokio::select! {
            Some(event) = rx.recv() => match event {
                Event::Request(req) => {
                    current_request = Some(req.url);
                }
                Event::Timeout => {
                    current_request = Some("default".to_string());
                }
            },
            _ = timeout.tick(), if current_request.is_some() => {
                let url = current_request.take().unwrap();
                let resp = query_service(&url).await;
                send_response(resp).await;
            }
        }
    }
}

async fn query_service(_url: &str) -> Response { todo!() }
async fn send_response(_resp: Response) { todo!() }
enum Event { Request(Request), Timeout }
struct Request { url: String }
struct Response;
